title: Nonaqueous electrolyte battery and battery pack

events.title: Assigned to KABUSHIKI KAISHA TOSHIBA
description: ASSIGNMENT OF ASSIGNORS INTEREST (SEE DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS).
Assignors: FUJITA, YUMI, INAGAKI, HIROKI, MATSUNO, SHINSUKE, MORISHIMA, HIDEAKI, SARUWATARI, HIDESATO, TAKAMI, NORIO

classifications.description: Electrodes based on inorganic compounds other than oxides or hydroxides, e.g. sulfides, selenides, tellurides, halogenides or LiCoFy
Oxygenated metallic salts or polyanionic structures, e.g. borates, phosphates, silicates, olivines
Electrodes based on mixed oxides or hydroxides, or on mixtures of oxides or hydroxides, e.g. LiCoOx

Selection of substances as active materials, active masses, active liquids of inorganic oxides or hydroxides of mixed oxides or hydroxides for inserting or intercalating light metals, e.g. LiTi2O4 or LiTi2OxFy

abstract: A nonaqueous eletrolyte battery includes a negative electrode containing a titanium-containing oxide, a positive electrode, and a nonaqueous electrolyte. The positive electrode includes a lithium-transition metal composite oxide and at least one kind of oxide selected from a group consisting of FePO4, Li3Fe2(PO4)3, LiFeP2O7, Fe4(P2O7)3, Fe2(SO4) 3, and V2O5.
claims:
1. A nonaqueous electrolyte battery comprising: 
a negative electrode containing a titanium-containing oxide;  a positive electrode containing a lithium-transition metal composite oxide and at least one kind of oxide selected from a group consisting of FePO4, Li3Fe2(PO4)3, LiFeP2O7, Fe4(P2O7)3, Fe2(SO4)3, and V2O5; and  a nonaqueous electrolyte.
2. The battery according to claim 1, wherein a ratio of said at least one kind of oxide to the lithium-transition metal composite oxide is in the range of 0.1 to 10 wt %.
3. The battery according to claim 1, wherein a ratio of said at least one kind of oxide to the lithium-transition metal composite oxide is in the range of 1 to 10 wt %.
4. The battery according to claim 1, wherein a ratio of said at least one kind of oxide to the lithium-transition metal composite oxide is in the range of 1 to 5 wt %.
5. The battery according to claim 1, wherein the titanium-containing oxide is lithium titanate having a spinel structure.
6. The battery according to claim 1, wherein said at least one kind of oxide is amorphous FePO4 or FePO4 having a hexagonal structure.
7. The battery according to claim 1, wherein the lithium-transition metal composite oxide is LiNi1−xMxO2 (M: at least one of Co and Al, 0<X≦0.3) or LiNiaCobMncO2 (0.3<a<1, 0<b<1, 0.3<c<1).

8. The battery according to claim 1, wherein the lithium-transition metal composite oxide is LiNi1−xMxO2 (M: at least one of Co and Al, 0<X≦0.3) or LiNiaCobMncO2 (0.3<a<1, 0≦b<1, 0.3<c<1), and 
said at least one kind of oxide is FePO4.

9. A battery pack comprising nonaqueous electrolyte batteries, wherein 
the nonaqueous electrolyte batteries comprise:  a negative electrode containing a titanium-containing oxide;  a positive electrode containing a lithium-transition metal composite oxide and at least one kind of oxide selected from a group consisting of FePO4, Li3Fe2(PO4)3, LiFeP2O7, Fe4(P2O7)3, Fe2(SO4)3, and V2O5; and  a nonaqueous electrolyte.
10. The battery pack according to claim 9, wherein a ratio of said at least one kind of oxide to the lithium-transition metal composite oxide is in the range of 0.1 to 10 wt %.
11. The battery pack according to claim 9, wherein the titanium-containing oxide is lithium titanate having a spinel structure.
12. The battery pack according to claim 9, wherein said at least one kind of oxide is amorphous FePO4 or FePO4 having a hexagonal structure.
13. The battery pack according to claim 9, wherein the lithium-transition metal composite oxide is LiNi1−xMxO2 (M: at least one of Co and Al, 0<X≦0.3) or LiNiaCobMncO2 (0.3<a<1, 0<b≦1, 0.3<c<1).

14. The battery pack according to claim 9, wherein the lithium-transition metal composite oxide is LiNi1−xMxO2 (M: at least one of Co and Al, 0<X≦0.3) or LiNiaCobMncO2 (0.3<a<1, 0≦b≦1, 0.3<c <1), and 
said at least one kind of oxide is FePO4.
15. A vehicle comprising the battery pack according to claim 9.

16. A positive electrode including: 
a lithium-transition metal composite oxide; and  at least one kind of oxide selected from a group consisting of FePO4, Li3Fe2(PO4)3, LiFeP2O7, Fe4(P2O7)3, Fe2(SO4)3, and V2O5.
17. The positive electrode according to claim 16, wherein a ratio of said at least one kind of oxide to the lithium-transition metal composite oxide is in the range of 0.1 to 10 wt %.
18. The positive electrode according to claim 16, wherein said at least one kind of oxide is amorphous FePO4 or FePO4 having a hexagonal structure.

19. The positive electrode according to claim 16, wherein the lithium-transition metal composite oxide is LiNi1−xMxO2 (M: at least one of Co and Al, 0<X≦0.3) or LiNiaCobMncO2 (0.3<a<1, 0≦b<1, 0.3<c<1).
